Welcome.

About

Luke Fretwell is co-founder and CEO of the digital government platform, ProudCity, founder of the government innovation blog, GovFresh, and co-host of The Government We Need, a podcast exploring the government of the future and how it can best serve everyone.

He regularly writes and speaks to the media about government and civic technology.

About Luke
